name: Cranberry-Orange Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, chop almonds until ground.
2. Add butter, brown sugar, and flour to the almond mixture. Process until the mixture forms a ball.
3. Add egg to the dough and process again until combined.
4. Press the dough into a 9-inch springform pan to form a 2-inch-high crust on all sides.
5. Chill the crust for 20 minutes.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes, or until edges are golden.
7. Cool the crust completely.
8. In a saucepan, combine orange juice and gelatin. Let stand 5 minutes to soften, then stir over low heat until gelatin is dissolved.
9. Stir in marmalade and brown sugar, bringing mixture to a boil.
10. Add cranberries and reduce heat to simmer. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
11. Remove from heat and skim off foam.
12. Pour the sauce into the cooled crust and chill the tart for several hours or overnight.
13. To serve, remove sides of the springform pan and place the tart on a serving platter.
14. Melt remaining marmalade and brush over the tart.
Makes 1 (9-inch) tart
